6:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Standalone pip Install"}]
7:["$","p",null,{"children":"The simplest way to get started:"}]
8:["$","$L1c",null,{"code":"pip install mnemosyne-memory","language":"bash"}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":"This installs the core package with all required dependencies."}]
a:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Hermes Plugin Install"}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":"If you're using Mnemosyne as a Hermes agent plugin:"}]
c:["$","$L1c",null,{"code":"hermes plugin install mnemosyne","language":"bash"}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":["Or add to your ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes.yaml"}],":"]}]
e:["$","$L1c",null,{"code":"plugins:\n- name: mnemosyne\n  config:\n    db_path: ./memory.db\n    embedding_model: text-embedding-3-small\n","language":"yaml"}]
